#test_no_jump_without_trace_function
z0JumpTestCase.test_no_jump_without_trace_functionc
def f(output):        # line 0
            x = 0                     # line 1
            y = 1                     # line 2
            '''                       # line 3
            %s                        # lines 4-1004
            '''                       # line 1005
            x += 1                    # line 1006
            output.append(x)          # line 1007
            return)
test_large_function
z JumpTestCase.test_large_functionc
# Comments don't count.
output.append(2)  # firstlineno is here.
output.append(3)
output.append(4)
